      "text": "Un winnam buhs weenn

nu Eepu pee weena Wehrfcha/
un weenu Eepu pee weena Auna/
un weenu Innu Etjes pee twee-
nas Eepas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un feptita Mehnefi peek-
tapadefinita Deend tahs Meh-
nes/ buhs winnam Swehtkos
tapatt darriht/ zaur feptimahn
Deenahm weenlihds ar ta Greh-
tu-Uppura/ un Dedsamo-Uppu-
ra/ un Ehdamo-Uppura/ un Et-
jes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XLVI. Nodalla.
No teem Uppureem Swehtkos un jaunds
Mehneschos: 1. No ta Leel-Kunga Uppu-
va: 4. Un no tahs Weetas/ fur teem Pree-
steruem un zitteem Sullaineem ta Deewa
Namma buhs wahrift: 19.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Na fakta tas Klings
KUNGS: Ta eekscheja
Pagalmija Wahrtis/ kas
prett Seemeta-Puffi irr/ lai tan-
nis feschas Darbu Deenas ais-
flehgtas irr/ bet Swehdeenä lai
winnas tohp atwehrtas/ un jan-
na Mehnes Deena lai tahs tohp
atdarritas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tam Waldneekam buhs
ee-eet zaur to Zettu to patchu
Wahrtu Preekch-Namma no
ahrenes/ un pee to Wahrtu
Stendexeim stahweht/ un teem
Preeftexeem buhs winna Dedsa-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "mo-Uppuri un winna Ba-
schanas-Uppureus fataifihit/
winnam buhs pee to Wa-
Sleekka peeluhgt/ un tad-
eet/ bet tahm Wahrtim ne-
aisflehgtahm tapt lihds Wa-
ram.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir teem Landim t
Seimnes buhs pee to pa-
Wahrtu Durwin peelu-
Swehdeenäs/ un jaunds M-
neschos preeksch ta KUNGA
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nu tas Dedsamo-
puris/ ko tas Waldneeks t
KUNGAM buhs uppureht/
Swehdeenä irr fefchi Jehri/
beg Wainas/ un weens Au-
kas beg Wainas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Ehdamo-Uppu-
laid irr weena Eepa pee ta D-
na/ bet pee teem Jehreem
tasEhdamo-Uppuris irr/ zik w-
na Rohku dohd/ un Etjes wee-
Ins pee weenas Eepas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet jauna Mehnes D-
nä lai tas irr weens jau-
Wehrfis/ kas beg Wainas/
tefchi Jehri un weens Auns/ tee-
buhs beg Wainas buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winnam buhs par E-
damo-Uppuri fataifihit wee-
Eepu pee ta Wehrfcha/ un wee-
Eepu pee ta Auna/ bet pee tee-
Jehreem zik winna Rohka da-
buhs/ un weens Ins Etjes p-
weenas Eepas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tas Waldnee-
ee-eet/ tad buhs winnam zaur
Preefsch-Namma Wahrtun e-
ce
"
